'''mazotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yofortierite|yofortierite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yofortierite|yofortierite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mazotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzetheth|mæzetheth]] || [[word:mæzethej|mæzethej]] || [[word:mæzethesh|mæzethesh]] || [[word:mæzethe|mæzethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazozothoth|mazozothoth]] || [[word:mazozothoj|mazozothoj]] || [[word:mazozothosh|mazozothosh]] || [[word:mazozotho|mazozotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazothoth|mazothoth]] || [[word:mazothoj|mazothoj]] || [[word:mazothosh|mazothosh]] || [[word:mazotho|mazotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazofthoth|mazofthoth]] || [[word:mazofthoj|mazofthoj]] || [[word:mazofthosh|mazofthosh]] || [[word:mazofthof|mazofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazothotho|mazothotho]] || [[word:mazothojo|mazothojo]] || [[word:mazothosho|mazothosho]] || [[word:mazothoko|mazothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazothoth|mazothoth]] || [[word:mazothoj|mazothoj]] || [[word:mazothosh|mazothosh]] || [[word:mazotho|mazotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazothothol|mazothothol]] || [[word:mazothojol|mazothojol]] || [[word:mazothoshol|mazothoshol]] || [[word:mazothokol|mazothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazothothotho|mazothothotho]] || [[word:mazothojojo|mazothojojo]] || [[word:mazothoshosho|mazothoshosho]] || [[word:mazothoko|mazothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazothothon|mazothothon]] || [[word:mazothojon|mazothojon]] || [[word:mazothoshon|mazothoshon]] || [[word:mazothokon|mazothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazothothoro|mazothothoro]] || [[word:mazothojoro|mazothojoro]] || [[word:mazothoshoro|mazothoshoro]] || [[word:mazothokoro|mazothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
